subject: Anthropic 与三星洽谈定制芯片
object: On Thursday, The Information reported that Anthropic was in contact with Samsung to explore a collaboration around the pending chip. However, Anthropic hasn’t yet decided what the chip will be used for, how it will fit into the server, or how powerful it will be, according to the report.

subject: Anthropic 与三星洽谈定制芯片
object: When reached for comment, Anthropic told TechCrunch that a diversified hardware stack that includes chips from Google, Amazon, and Nvidia will continue to be pivotal to its compute strategy. On the topic of a potential Samsung partnership, the company said it had nothing further to add.

subject: Claude Code v2.1.199
object: CLAUDE_CODE_RETRY_WATCHDOG now raises the default retry count for non-capacity transient errors to 300 and lifts the cap of 15 on CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_RETRIES

subject: Kimi K2.7 Code 已在 GitHub Copilot 上正式
object: Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-weight model, is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. This is the first open-weight model offered as a selectable option in the Copilot model picker, giving you more choice and a lower-cost option for your coding workflows.

subject: Kimi K2.7 Code 已在 GitHub Copilot 上正式
object: Kimi K2.7 Code is hosted by GitHub on Microsoft Azure.

subject: Kimi K2.7 Code 已在 GitHub Copilot 上正式
object: This model is billed at provider list pricing under usage-based billing. See GitHub Copilot’s pricing for models and requests for details.

subject: 华擎推出 ASRock Claw Quickset 桌面工具，可简化本地 AI 环境
object: 其专为简化本地 AI 环境部署而设计， 能自动完成 OpenClaw、AI 模型及各项必要软件组件的安装与设定 。

subject: 华擎推出 ASRock Claw Quickset 桌面工具，可简化本地 AI 环境
object: 这一工具专为搭载华擎主板或显卡的 Windows 系统打造，默认部署本地 AI 环境，支持通过 OpenClaw 配置云端算力；默认状态下，文件访问权限仅限于指定工作区，系统层级功能则一律关闭。
